summary: Comprehensive testing of new features complete: Document Vault with AI Analysis, Connected Accounts (Account Aggregation), PDF Export, Enhanced AI Copilot, and Financial Plan Generator. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages load correctly with all expected elements. Account Aggregation is MOCKED (simulates Plaid-like bank connections).

ui_bugs.issue: Modal appears on every page load and requires checkbox + button click to dismiss. Should use localStorage to persist user acceptance.

passed_tests: Document Vault - GET /api/documents returns documents list with categories
Document Vault - GET /api/documents/search returns search results
Document Vault - POST /api/documents/upload creates new document
AI Document Analysis - POST /api/documents/analyze returns document_type, extracted_data, key_insights, recommendations, confidence_score
AI Document Analysis - Insurance document analysis returns correct document_type
AI Document Analysis - POST /api/documents/insights returns coverage_analysis and gaps_identified
Connected Accounts - GET /api/accounts/aggregated returns accounts with summary (total_assets, total_liabilities, net_worth)
Connected Accounts - GET /api/accounts/{id}/transactions returns transactions with summary
Connected Accounts - POST /api/accounts/sync syncs all accounts
Connected Accounts - GET /api/accounts/cashflow returns expense_breakdown and savings_rate
Connected Accounts - GET /api/accounts/institutions returns available institutions
Connected Accounts - POST /api/accounts/connect connects new account
PDF Export - POST /api/export/financial-plan generates PDF with base64 data
AI Copilot - POST /api/copilot/chat returns AI response with insights
AI Copilot - GET /api/copilot/suggestions returns suggested questions
AI Copilot - Multi-turn conversation flow works with history
Financial Plan Generator - POST /api/ai/generate-financial-plan returns comprehensive plan
critical_code_review_comments: Compliance modal should persist user acceptance in localStorage to avoid showing on every page load

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly with expected elements)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing Wheeler family demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Document Vault with AI Analysis - 7 documents, categories, AI-powered analysis with confidence scores. 2) Connected Accounts - 6 accounts from Commonwealth Bank, Vanguard, Australian Super, Macquarie Bank with $1.14M total assets. 3) PDF Export - generates base64 encoded PDFs. 4) AI Copilot - multi-language support (15 languages), quick actions, suggested questions. 5) Financial Plan Generator - comprehensive plans with executive summary, retirement plan, investment strategy, tax strategy, action plan. Account Aggregation is MOCKED (simulates Plaid-like connections).

mocked_apis_list: Account Aggregation (simulates Plaid-like bank connections - Commonwealth Bank, Vanguard, Australian Super, Macquarie Bank)
